description: CompositionNavy blue polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with mustard yellow and white stripes, pocket on left chest with embroidered branding, ribbed collar with buttoned chest placket and split hem sidesFittingComfort Wash care Wash in cold water at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not bleach or tumble dry Avoid beating and twisting Wash dark colours separately Do not dry in direct sunlight Reverse line dry in shade Reshape garment to original form when wet Designed for comfort and style, this soft cotton polo neck t-shirt looks great for casual occasions. Stylish to the T, the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and dry all day. Team this with jeans or shorts and casual footwear for that cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
